title: Lack of Data Classification and Access Controls
description: Without knowing the data types being handled, it’s impossible to assess the potential impact of a breach.  Furthermore, the absence of robust access controls means sensitive data could be exposed to unauthorized users.  This could lead to data leaks, exposure of confidential information, and potential regulatory violations.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to data through vulnerabilities in the application or database, or through compromised user accounts.
mitigations: Implement a data classification scheme to identify and categorize sensitive data.
Enforce the principle of least privilege, granting users only the access they need to perform their jobs.
Regularly audit access controls and user permissions.
